title: ReviewerOutput
description: Output schema for the reviewer worker. The reviewer checks plan quality before the generator runs.

status.description: pass = plan is ready for generator; fail = plan needs revision.

summary.description: One concise sentence describing the overall verdict.

findings.description: Specific issues found. Each item names the criterion and describes the problem. Empty if status is pass.

criterion.description: Which review criterion this finding belongs to.

severity.description: FAIL blocks progress; WARN is noted but does not block.

description.description: Specific, actionable description of the issue.

replan_guidance.description: Concise, actionable instruction for the planner to fix the identified issues. Empty string when status is pass.
